item.title: Time to build your business with Hermes Agent.Two weeks to get your submissions in, 100% online, huge prizes.Learn more about the Hermes Agent Accelerated Business hackathon below - presented by NVIDI

item.title: RT by @Teknium: Hermes @NousResearch Telegram Rich Messages is now working on Desktop. 🚀
item.description: <p>Hermes <a href="https://nitter.net/NousResearch" title="Nous Research">@NousResearch</a> Telegram Rich Messages is now working on Desktop. 🚀</p><a href="https://nitter.net/iamlukethedev/status/2066558049339228544#m"><br />Video<br /> <img src="https://nitter.net/pic/amplify_video_thumb%2F206655

item.title: RT by @Teknium: ⚕️ Hermes Tip of the Day:You can use Kanban for literally every workflow in Hermes Agent.✅ Deep research.✅ Large writing projects.✅ Coding.✅ You name it.This is the best way to keep yo
item.description: <p>⚕️ Hermes Tip of the Day:<br /><br />You can use Kanban for literally every workflow in Hermes Agent.<br /><br />✅ Deep research.<br />✅ Large writing projects.<br />✅ Coding.<br />✅ You name it.<br /><br />This is the best way to keep your projects organized and your agents focused and locked in

item.title: RT by @BrianRoemmele: This archive is exceptionally valuable—potentially transformative. Rescuing hundreds of thousands of mostly undigitized PhD dissertations (many last copies, physics-heavy, 1873–e
item.description: This archive is exceptionally valuable—potentially transformative. Rescuing hundreds of thousands of mostly undigitized PhD dissertations (many last copies, physics-heavy, 1873–early 2000s) preserves irreplaceable scientific thought processes, overlooked ideas, and historical context lost to pre-dig

item.title:
RT by @l2beat: Presenting now, @l2beat on providing open-source research and analytics on Layer 2s and public protocols, including interoperability, DA, and ZK infrastructure.
A few wins from them: -
item.description:
Presenting now, @l2beat on providing open-source research and analytics on Layer 2s and public protocols, including interoperability, DA, and ZK infrastructure.
A few wins from them: - New Interoperability page and the entire infrastructure around it - Token registry covering 3,000+ token deploymen

item.title: BillionToOne Goes Public — The Startup That Made Genetic Testing Universal
item.description: Today, BillionToOne goes public, becoming YC's fourth publicly traded biotech company. More importantly, they have built one of the most important genetic tests in the U.S. Today, 1 in 11 babies born in the US are tested with BillionToOne's fetal genetic test.

item.title: Canada is looking to build up to 10 new nuclear reactors over the next 15 years
Zen and the Art of Machine Learning Research
To study how chips work, MIT researchers built their own operating system
